Core Capabilities

We operate as a full-service digital infrastructure partner — from strategy and architecture through to deployment, automation, and ongoing optimization.

01
Software Engineering & Product Development
Full-stack web product development across fintech, education, and digital platforms — from architecture design to pixel-perfect delivery.
02
Digital Infrastructure & Systems
Centralized business systems, CRM architecture, and custom operational dashboards built to handle real-world complexity at scale.
03
Automation & Workflow Engineering
End-to-end workflow automation, payment processing, booking systems, and internal process optimization that eliminate friction.
04
Revenue Operations Systems
Sales pipeline architecture, conversion optimization, lead tracking, and performance analytics designed to improve commercial outcomes.
05
Product & Platform Development
Web applications, marketplace platforms, and scalable digital products built with modern, maintainable technology stacks.
06
Growth & Marketing Systems
Paid acquisition across Meta and Google, funnel design, and data-driven customer journey optimization that converts at scale.

The Team

An in-house team across every discipline — no outsourcing, no accountability gaps.

Emmanuel Akomolafe
Founder & CEO · Etech Nexus

Emmanuel is the CEO of Etech Nexus, a growth strategy and digital infrastructure company that helps businesses build scalable systems, improve market positioning, and expand into new markets. He works with founders and organizations to turn ideas and existing businesses into structured, revenue-generating growth engines.

Project Portfolio

A cross-industry track record spanning government systems, enterprise tools, web platforms, and revenue infrastructure — delivered across multiple markets.

Enterprise — Government / Education
University of Ilesha — Salary Management System

Designed and implemented a centralized salary management system for a university institution, replacing manual payroll processes with an automated, accuracy-focused financial infrastructure.

  • Automated key administrative payroll processes, significantly reducing manual workload
  • Improved financial accuracy and operational efficiency at institutional scale
Enterprise — Government / Education
FUNAAB — Library Computerization System

Led the full digitization of a federal university library — transitioning operations from manual cataloguing to a structured digital platform with modern resource management capabilities.

  • Enabled efficient cataloguing, tracking, and access to library resources
  • Full system migration from manual processes to digital infrastructure
Web Platform — Builder Tool
DragBuild — Website Builder Platform

Developed a drag-and-drop web application enabling users to build and publish websites dynamically, built with a modern stack focused on performance, scalability, and seamless UX.

  • Built with Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and JWT authentication
  • Performance-first architecture with scalable deployment infrastructure
Web Platform — Internal Communications
TeamSprint — Internal Communication Platform

Built a full-stack social messaging platform designed to improve internal communication and collaboration within organizations — with secure authentication and optimized media handling.

  • Secure authentication systems with cloud-based media optimization
  • Full-stack architecture supporting real-time interaction and team collaboration
Web Platform — Fintech
Zanctions — Financial Management Platform

Developed a transaction management system enabling businesses to manage financial records efficiently, with a scalable backend and high-reliability design for continuous operations.

  • CRUD operations with scalable backend and responsive frontend interface
  • Engineered for high reliability in continuous, business-critical environments
Developer Tools — Open Source
OoinJS — Reactive UI Library

Currently developing a reactive UI library aimed at simplifying frontend development workflows and improving application performance through modular architecture and developer-friendly design systems.

  • Modular architecture focused on developer experience and adoption
  • Performance-first design system with minimal abstraction overhead
Education — Digital Transformation
Radiance School Academy

Led end-to-end digital transformation for a 1,000+ student institution — deploying centralized systems for payments, student administration, and school operations.

B2B Marketplace — Africa
Tracto Africa

Leading development of a B2B marketplace with integrated revenue systems, supplier onboarding infrastructure, and scalable transaction architecture for the African market.

Government — Predictive Analytics
AI Accident Prediction System

Directing execution of a predictive analytics system using historical data to reduce road accident rates — coordinating multidisciplinary teams across data science, engineering, and policy.
